content:
- 最近留意到一款与我们玩法相近的游戏上线，很多朋友问我有没有去玩。虽然我还没实机体验，但确实有看到他们有不少做得很好的地方。
- 我认为对我们而言，更重要的是把自己的特色打磨好，并持续优化那些不佳的体验。也想听听大家的真实想法：有哪些内容是你不希望改变的？又有哪些是你希望我们去调整、改进，或者大胆尝试的？
- 欢迎通过你习惯的任何方式告诉我，包括频道@ 我、私信都可以。当下我们正全力收尾二周年版本，就算本次版本可能很难解决所有问题，但是我们也会作为后续开发的参考，尽力回应大家的期待。

- I recently noticed a game with a similar playstyle to ours has launched, and many friends asked if I’ve tried it. I haven’t had hands-on time yet, but I did see quite a few things they’ve done very well.
- For us, what matters more is refining our own distinctive features and continuously improving rough or unsatisfying experiences. I’d also like to hear your honest thoughts: which parts would you prefer we don’t change, and which parts would you like us to adjust, improve, or even experiment with more boldly?
- Feel free to reach out in whatever way you prefer—@ me in the channel or DM me. We’re currently working hard to wrap up the 2nd-anniversary version. Even if this update may not be able to address everything, we’ll use your feedback as a reference for subsequent development and do our best to meet everyone’s expectations.
